scripts.org:create:localdev: node scripts/run-sf.js org create scratch --definition-file config/project-scratch-def.json --alias novarigel-localdev --set-default
scripts.deploy:localdev: node scripts/run-sf.js project deploy start --source-dir force-app/main/default/objects/Interview__c --source-dir force-app/main/default/objects/Human__c --source-dir force-app/main/default/classes/HumanPublicRegistrationController.cls --source-dir force-app/main/default/classes/HumanPublicRegistrationService.cls --source-dir force-app/main/default/classes/HumanPublicRegistrationControllerTest.cls --source-dir force-app/main/default/lwc/humanPublicRegistration
scripts.localdev:human: node scripts/run-sf.js lightning dev component --name humanPublicRegistration
